title: AMPL Knowledge Base Chunk Record
description: One retrieval chunk produced by scripts/chunk.py from a docs/*.md file.

document_id.description: Stable identifier for the source file, derived from its path relative to docs/. Dots replace directory separators. Example: 01-introduction-to-ampl.1.1-what-is-ampl

title.description: Human-readable title. Taken from frontmatter 'title'; falls back to the lowest heading in the chunk's heading stack.

oneOf.description: Multiple source URLs when the document consolidates several pages.

source_url.description: Canonical URL(s) of the original source page(s). Empty string if the document has no known source URL.

version.description: Doc version string, e.g. '2.x'. Empty string if not specified.

content_type.description: Retrieval category that governs token budgets and chunking behaviour.

headings.description: Heading breadcrumb from document root to this chunk's section. Empty array for pre-heading content. Example: ['1.1 What is AMPL', 'AMPL syntax', 'Parameters']

symbols.description: Identifiers found in the source document (class names, method names, AMPL keywords, solver option keys). Inherited from the parent document's frontmatter.

doc_area.description: Top-level documentation category. Matches doc_structure.md taxonomy.

doc_sub_area.description: Optional refinement of doc_area. Empty string when not applicable.

summary.description: One to three sentence retrieval summary of the source document. Inherited from frontmatter; empty string if not set.

needs_review.description: True when the AI pipeline flagged truncation, garbled structure, or missing content in the source document.

token_estimate.description: Estimated token count of text_clean. Computed with tiktoken cl100k_base when available; falls back to len(text_clean)//4.

text.description: Retrieval-optimised text. Prepends '[Heading > Stack]' breadcrumb context, then overlap prefix from the previous chunk (if any), then text_clean. Use this field as the embedding input.

text_clean.description: Raw chunk content without heading context or overlap prefix. Use this field when displaying the chunk to an LLM or user.

examples.title: What is AMPL — language philosophy and design goals
headings: 1.1 What is AMPL — language philosophy and design goals
examples.summary: AMPL is a high-level algebraic modeling language …
examples.text:
[1.1 What is AMPL … > AMPL syntax]

An AMPL model describes …
examples.text_clean: An AMPL model describes the same mathematical structure …

examples.title: Gurobi options
examples.summary: Partial reference for Gurobi MP-driver options …
